items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: This gym changed my life! The coaches are incredibly supportive and the community is amazing.

items.name: James T.
items.text: Best equipment I've seen in any gym. Highly recommend!

items.name: Emma L.
items.text: The classes are fantastic and the staff is always helpful. Worth every penny.

items.question: Do I need a membership contract?
items.answer: No, all memberships are flexible month-to-month with no long-term commitment.

items.question: Are there personal training options?
items.answer: Yes! Our Pro and Elite plans include personal training sessions. We also offer packages for Basic members.

items.question: What are the operating hours?
items.answer: We're open Monday-Friday 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM, Saturday 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sunday 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM.

items.question: Can I freeze my membership?
items.answer: Yes, you can freeze for up to 3 months per year with no additional fees.
